case_title: AMICA MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY VS. SANDRA APPEL et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $139.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT APPEL, SANDRA
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-10-2002 CONTINUED TO SEP-11-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. JUL-10-2002 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMICA MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT APPEL, SANDRA $1,039.63 PRINCIPAL, $131.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,170.63, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMICA MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT APPEL, SANDRA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-29-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-25-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-01-2002
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMICA MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED JAN-01-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT APPEL, SANDRA

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-08-2002 CONTINUED TO JUL-10-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC TO PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY MICHAEL G. MCKANE. MAY-08-2002 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $139.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT APPEL, SANDRA

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-08-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). OSC TO PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY MICHAEL G. MCKANE. THE MAR-29-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMICA MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-11-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CERTIFICATE OF FACTS RE UNSATISFIED JUDGMENT, ISSUED -- FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMICA MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY
